title: Garlicky Sea Bass with French Pilaf
description: A flavorful and healthy dish featuring pan-seared sea bass served with a side of garlicky French pilaf.
instructions: Season the sea bass fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the sea bass fillets for 2-3 minutes per side, then transfer to the oven.
Cook for 8-10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, prepare the pilaf.
Heat the vegetable broth in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the uncooked rice and stir to coat the rice with the broth.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 18-20 minutes or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in the minced garlic.
Serve the sea bass with the garlicky French pilaf.
